title: schoenus subaxillaris
intro: Schoenus subaxillaris, also known as the river club-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to be due to the presence of certain compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Schoenus subaxillaris include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be dried and used as a tea or tincture.
